concerns.text: FR-007 requires flagging strata with sample counts < 50 as 'underpowered'. Task T004 (data loading) and T014 (filtering) do not explicitly mandate the implementation of this stratification logic or the 'underpowered' flagging mechanism. Without a specific task to implement the stratification logic defined in FR-007, the system cannot satisfy the edge case handling requirement.

FR-007 mandates handling undefined entropy (zero entropy) by assigning a minimal non-zero value or excluding the sample. Task T012 mentions 'Handle undefined entropy' but does not explicitly task the implementation of the specific logic (assignment vs. exclusion) or the documentation of the exclusion rate required by FR-007. This risks incomplete implementation of the edge case.

FR-006 requires a 'non-inferiority test' against the static k=2 baseline. Task T021 mentions 'perform non-inferiority test' but lacks the specific task to implement the statistical test logic (e.g., one-sided t-test or equivalence test parameters) defined in FR-006. The task description is too high-level to guarantee the specific statistical method is implemented.

FR-005 requires applying 'Holm-Bonferroni' correction. Task T025 mentions 'Apply Holm-Bonferroni' but does not explicitly task the implementation of the correction algorithm or the logic to apply it across 'difficulty strata' as specified in FR-005. The task relies on the implementer inferring the specific algorithmic details not present in the task description.

SC-005 requires measuring 'total runtime and resource usage (RAM/GPU memory)'. No task explicitly mandates the implementation of a resource monitoring/logging mechanism to capture and report these metrics. T029 mentions 'Run full validation... to verify pipeline within 6-hour limit' but does not task the code to actually measure and record the resource usage for the report.
